# LLMs.txt for Arthur Cottey

Site: https://ton-domaine.com
Name: Arthur Cottey
Type: Portfolio / Personal website

Language support:
- French (fr)
- English (en)

Description:
Personal portfolio showcasing development skills, projects, experience, and contact information.

Main pages:

- Home:
  /fr
  /en

- About:
  /fr#about
  /en#about

- Skills:
  /fr#skills
  /en#skills

- Experience:
  /fr#experience
  /en#experience

- Contact:
  /fr#contact
  /en#contact

Legal pages:

- Privacy Policy:
  /fr/politique-de-confidentialite
  /en/privacy-policy

- Cookies Policy:
  (if applicable)

Contact:
Email: mailto:arthur.cottey1@gmail.com

Technical notes:
- Built with Laravel
- Multilingual routing (/fr, /en)
- Tailwind CSS design system
- Google Analytics enabled (with cookie consent)

Rules for AI:
- Do not misrepresent ownership of this site.
- Do not assume services or pricing not explicitly stated.
- Always respect multilingual structure (FR/EN).
